messages.author: sporkulon.
messages.text: Two nodes in the state so far, want to make more?
messages.content_html: Two nodes in the state so far, want to make more?

messages.author: Splicer
messages.text: I'm in the Albany NY area and I have family and friends in Precision Valley and the Northeast Kingdom. Very interested in seeing how this mesh can get built out. There's also talk in the New England regional channel about bridging the Albany area mesh with the Boston mesh, and I'd guess a few mountaintop nodes in VT and NH would do it. Sure would be nice to see!
messages.content_html: I'm in the Albany NY area and I have family and friends in Precision Valley and the Northeast Kingdom. Very interested in seeing how this mesh can get built out. There's also talk in the New England regional channel about bridging the Albany area mesh with the Boston mesh, and I'd guess a few mountaintop nodes in VT and NH would do it. Sure would be nice to see!

sporkulon.
Two nodes in the state so far, want to make more?

messages.author: LordNormandy
messages.text: I am located in Southern VT, Windham County. I want to set up a node there once the weather is a little nicer, probably this spring.
messages.content_html: I am located in Southern VT, Windham County. I want to set up a node there once the weather is a little nicer, probably this spring.

messages.author: Splicer
messages.text: I may be able to get repeaters up in Springfield which could reach some locations in the northern part of Windham
messages.content_html: I may be able to get repeaters up in Springfield which could reach some locations in the northern part of Windham
messages.reply_html:
LordNormandy
I am located in Southern VT, Windham County. I want to set up a node there once the weather is a little nicer, probably this spring.

messages.author: Cody
messages.text: I am interested in setting up some nodes/repeaters in the Southern VT area - is there a map for this state available to see current locations? (edited)
messages.content_html: I am interested in setting up some nodes/repeaters in the Southern VT area - is there a map for this state available to see current locations? (edited)

messages.author: Splicer
messages.text: This map shows a couple in Springfield and one in Bellows Falls. Also across the river south of Charlestown and in Keene. A few well-placed repeaters could cover a lot of area. I'm looking at Skelekinetic in Troy NH and the repeaters we have in Troy NY and thinking that "Troy to Troy" is a great goal.
messages.content_html: This map shows a couple in Springfield and one in Bellows Falls. Also across the river south of Charlestown and in Keene. A few well-placed repeaters could cover a lot of area. I'm looking at Skelekinetic in Troy NH and the repeaters we have in Troy NY and thinking that "Troy to Troy" is a great goal.
messages.reactions_html: 1
messages.reply_html:
Cody
I am interested in setting up some nodes/repeaters in the Southern VT area - is there a map for this state available to see current locations? (edited)

messages.author: Cody
messages.text: Awesome, thanks for the link. I may be able to get a few community members to assist with hosting a few nodes, I’ll try and see if I can see Springfield from a few locations. Troy to Troy would be amazing for something like this too
messages.content_html: Awesome, thanks for the link. I may be able to get a few community members to assist with hosting a few nodes, I’ll try and see if I can see Springfield from a few locations. Troy to Troy would be amazing for something like this too

messages.author: Güzi
messages.text: Have a couple nodes up in Bradford/Fairlee area, but they have never seen any other nodes. Need to find some mountain sites to deploy solar....reach out if you are nearby.
messages.content_html: Have a couple nodes up in Bradford/Fairlee area, but they have never seen any other nodes. Need to find some mountain sites to deploy solar....reach out if you are nearby.
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Cody
messages.text: Just about to get some nodes in the south central VT area, I will see if I can get a directional antenna and get over the peaks to grab signal (edited)
messages.content_html: Just about to get some nodes in the south central VT area, I will see if I can get a directional antenna and get over the peaks to grab signal (edited)
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Güzi
messages.text: Happy to collaborate on extending point to point routers...either MT or MC. We have a unique opportunity to shape VT mesh going forward...
messages.content_html: Happy to collaborate on extending point to point routers...either MT or MC. We have a unique opportunity to shape VT mesh going forward...

messages.author: Cody
messages.text: Awesome, I’m working on MC currently with the longer node reach, getting some RAK 1w systems today to start testing repeaters in the area
messages.content_html: Awesome, I’m working on MC currently with the longer node reach, getting some RAK 1w systems today to start testing repeaters in the area

messages.author: Güzi
messages.text: Nice, also using RAK 1w node setup for MC in a few different solar enclosures...ready to deploy. The NHmesh MT bleeds over every now and then but it's not consistent.
messages.content_html: Nice, also using RAK 1w node setup for MC in a few different solar enclosures...ready to deploy. The NHmesh MT bleeds over every now and then but it's not consistent.

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
